section_name: Driver license expired for 6 months or less; penalties
text: A person whose driver license has been expired for 6 months or less and who drives a motor vehicle upon the highways of this state commits an infraction and is subject to the penalty provided in s. 318.18 .
markdown:
### Chapter 322. Driver Licenses
##### § 322.065 — Driver license expired for 6 months or less; penalties

A person whose driver license has been expired for 6 months or less and who drives a motor vehicle upon the highways of this state commits an infraction and is subject to the penalty provided in s. 318.18 .

subsections.text: A person whose driver license has been expired for 6 months or less and who drives a motor vehicle upon the highways of this state commits an infraction and is subject to the penalty provided in s. 318.18 .
